accepted_findings.issue: User-local install docs must not make --force the default first path.
accepted_findings.evidence: guardian_owl:G-001 cites user-local docs that previously recommended --force by default.
accepted_findings.impact: Users could overwrite or migrate files without reviewing target paths.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Document dry-run and non-force install first; reserve --force for reviewed overwrite or legacy migration.

accepted_findings.issue: Plugin installer preflight needs regression coverage.
accepted_findings.evidence: proof_owl:P-001 cites plugin installer preflight as a packaging blocker.
accepted_findings.impact: A plugin install conflict could partially write files if untested.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Add a plugin installer conflict preflight regression test.

accepted_findings.issue: Release checklist and license text must stay consistent.
accepted_findings.evidence: proof_owl:P-003 and logic_owl:L-003 cite release checklist/license consistency.
accepted_findings.impact: External users could see contradictory packaging guidance.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Keep CHANGELOG, README, LICENSE, and packaging docs consistent.

rejected_findings.explanation: The preflight documentation action is covered by guardian_owl:G-001.
The model override example is useful but not release-blocking.
Custom root dry-run guidance is covered by the installer docs action.
Legacy cleanup guidance is covered by the --force migration action.
Full-accounting validator coverage is already part of release validation.

builder_instructions: Keep the release checklist/license wording consistent.
Add or keep plugin installer preflight coverage.
